headline: Is Amcor (AMCR) One of the Top 10 Dividend Aristocrat Stocks Ranked by Yield?
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 6.62% as of May 29, Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR) is included among the Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Yield: Top 10 Stocks. On May 20, Wells Fargo lowered its price recommendation on Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR) to $41 from $43. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm said it […]

headline: Amcor (AMCR) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Amcor (AMCR) has been drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock down about 19% over the past 3 months and roughly 9% over the past year. See our latest analysis for Amcor. Zooming out, the 19.4% decline in the 90 day share price return and 9.5% fall in the 1 year total shareholder return suggest momentum has been fading despite small gains in the past month. If Amcor’s recent pullback has you thinking about where else to put fresh capital to work, it could be a good...
